items.name: Silver 2-Bike Upright Tension Mount Garage Bike Rack by Rad Cycle
items.description: The RAD Aluminum Bike Rack from Rad Sports combines the utility you need with the lightweight strength and lasting quality of aluminum.The Aluminum Bike Rack secures to ceilings from 7 to 11 feet high. The aluminum top plate protects the ceiling from damage, yet holds the bike rack solidly in place. The base plate allows for a tight fit and stability on any surface. Easy installation with no drilling required.

items.name: Aquart Outdoor Shower by Seletti
items.description: Experience the unconventional charm of showering outdoors with the stylish Seletti Aquart Outdoor Shower. Designed to elevate the aesthetics of any garden space, this unique shower combines robust concrete with elegant copper to create a functional piece that doesn't compromise on style.

items.name: Tate Walnut Storage Bookshelf by Crate & Barrel
items.description: Tate Walnut Storage Bookshelf by Crate & Barrel. 1960s-inspired walnut veneer bookshelf designed by Blake Tovin. Solid poplar plywood with natural walnut finish, 3 fixed and 2 adjustable shelves. 22"W x 14.5"D x 75.5"H.

items.name: Tate 36" Walnut Bookcase Bar Cabinet by Crate & Barrel
items.description: Tate 36" Walnut Bookcase Bar Cabinet by Crate & Barrel. Features flanking open shelves alongside a flat-front door that drops down to reveal wine glass rack, glass shelf, mirrored back, and bottle storage. Walnut veneer over poplar plywood. 36"W x 14.5"D x 75.5"H. Designed by Blake Tovin.

items.name: Tate Walnut Desk with Outlet by Crate & Barrel
items.description: Tate Walnut Desk with Outlet by Crate & Barrel. Mid-century inspired walnut desk with integrated power strip (2 USB + 2 three-prong outlets). Clean-lined design with tapered legs. Designed by Blake Tovin.

items.name: Tate 80" Walnut Storage Media Console by Crate & Barrel
items.description: Tate 80" Walnut Storage Media Console by Crate & Barrel. 1960s-inspired media console/credenza with open and closed shelving for electronics and media. Naturally finished walnut veneer with clean architectural lines. 80"W x 16"D x 30"H. Designed by Blake Tovin.

items.name: Tate 36" Walnut Wide Bookcase by Crate & Barrel
items.description: Tate 36" Walnut Wide Bookcase by Crate & Barrel. Wide walnut veneer bookcase with natural walnut finish over solid poplar plywood. 3 fixed and 2 adjustable shelves with levelers. 36"W x 14.5"D x 75.5"H. Designed by Blake Tovin.

items.name: Tate 32" Black 5-Drawer Tall Dresser by Crate & Barrel
items.description: Tate 32" Black 5-Drawer Tall Dresser by Crate & Barrel. One small top drawer stacked on four large drawers. Ash and hardwood veneers finished in ebonized black. Gallery fronts, linear undercut drawer pulls, and tapered turned legs. 31.89"W x 20"D x 50.75"H. Designed by Blake Tovin.

items.name: Jarnagin Adjustable Writing Desk by Zipcode Design
items.description: This writing desk provides plenty of surface space for work and creative projects. It has a black powder-coated iron frame that supports the engineered wood surfaces. The wood comes in a rustic brown finish for a bit of contrast.
